breakdown: This PR fixes XP synthesis regressions by removing the problematic `_extract_xp_from_player_data` function and replacing it with `extract_character_xp`, while also adding `xp_awarded` from combat/encounter summaries as a priority source. The rename of `check_and_set_level_up_pending_impl` to `ensure_level_up_rewards_pending` improves clarity. Test coverage is weak since tests for the removed function remain in the diff but may not execute. Good defensive checks for dict types exist but some Any types still escape.
key_changes: Added `xp_awarded` extraction from combat_summary and encounter_summary in `_synthesize_generic_rewards_box`
Updated callers to use `extract_character_xp` instead of removed function
Added defensive `isinstance(combat_summary, dict)` check before accessing dict methods
